title: API connectivity issue "Cannot read property 'map' of undefined"

posts.author: vacho (Vick)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello everyone,

I am getting “Cannot read property ‘map’ of undefined” when trying to create an item in monday.com

keep in mind, board is set to private, I have tried my admin user level API key and also organization key, neither are working. please check my loom video for more details.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @vacho,

Thanks for reaching out!

This seems like you’re creating the item via Zapier, is that correct? If so, this error is most likely caused by a Dropdown column without any Labels in your board.

Could you please check if you have columns of the type “dropdown” with no labels available and if you do, add at least one label, refresh the Zapier tab and try again? (you do not need to actually select the label you create in any item, just create the label).

1976×507 77.5 KB
​

1957×786 98 KB

Adding labels and then re-selecting the board or refreshing fields should do the trick for you We are planning to fix this in the future, too.

-Alex

posts.author: EKasomi (Emmanuel Kasomi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Alex, even with my dropdown columns having labels, my Zapier integration is bringing this error:

Failed to create an item in monday.com
Cannot read property ‘create_item’ of undefined

Any help?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @EKasomi,

Would you be able to please send us an email to appsupport@monday.com so we can take a closer look into this?

It would be fantastic if you could include in the email:

  • Your monday account ID or name
  • Your user’s ID or email address
  • A screen recording of your entire Zapier flow where we can see the full configuration of your steps and the error you are getting on Zapier’s screen

With that information we will better understand the context to see if we can help you with your Zapier issue!

Cheers,
Matias
